title: The Cage Begins to Open
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on the cage begins to open, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Cage Begins to Open. Sanji’s hidden role as Mr. Prince disrupts Crocodile’s plan and creates the opening the crew needs to escape. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: That's Ridicu- Louis!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Alabastan Capital Alubarma

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's not a chance the king would do such a thing!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That report must be a mistake!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But the king's been reported missing for exactly the same amount of time,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: As it would take for one to get from allubanna to Nanohana!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There isn't any valid excuse we can give at the moment!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Not only that, news of the incident at Nanohana has already spread throughout the kingdom,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And the rebels have grown even more out of control as they voice their outrage!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Even many citizens who've believed in the king until now,

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Have turned their backs on King cobra and raised arms!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The flames of rebellion show no signs of stopping!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We don't have the numbers to suppress all the Revolts!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The whole populace is ready to strike at Alubanna!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's too late to stop them from attacking!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Please, sir! You must give the order to mobilize the army!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We shall gladly follow your every last order!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is an absurd turn of events... the King's words I heard only the day before are already turning hazy in my mind...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What am I supposed to do...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Who am I supposed to believe in...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Fine, if it's come to this, then so be it!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We are Alabama's Royal Guards!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We cannot allow the kingdom to fall just because the King is absent!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We shall defend the truth we see with our own eyes! We shall defend this kingdom!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: All troops will hereby move out,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And engage the Rebel Army!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Ohhh!

summary: This part develops the cage begins to open and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
